title: Drop the e2e test suite
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Drop the e2e suite, which largely duplicates other integration tests, and add an integration test to cover the "output from `inspect` is valid JSON" case.

#### How to verify it

The rest of the tests should pass, and CI shouldn't continue trying to run them now that they're gone.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
